creator: devin@sevenlayer.studio
text:
Created attachment 180391
Update to 1.11.2

This patch updates games/minecraft-server from version 1.11 to 1.11.2

The only change is the version number and the distinfo.

I tested this on my machine:
FreeBSD sodalime.pun-pun.prv 11.0-STABLE FreeBSD 11.0-STABLE #17 r314329: Tue Feb 28 09:58:34 JST 2017     devin@sodalime.pun-pun.prv:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/SODALIME  amd64

It worked stably for me.

Discussed with Jonathan Price (maintainer), he will approve this update.
